results.title: Will inequality always be part of our American ethos?
results.description: I'll leave you with this James Baldwin quote: “If one really wishes to know how justice is administered in a country, one does not question the policemen, the lawyers, the judges, or the protected members of the middle class. One goes to the unprotected — those, precisely, who need the law’s protection most! —and listens to their testimony,” writes Eric Foster today.
